top_signals.title: Technology Megacaps Slump as Rotation Trade Gathers Momentum
top_signals.summary: US stocks touched session lows Tuesday afternoon before paring their losses as a rotation out of the technology stocks that had propelled the market higher for most of the year gained traction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid advocate and Paradigm urge US to revise proposed anti-money laundering rule
top_signals.summary: The Hyperliquid-backed lobby group and Paradigm seek to prevent rules that would limit decentralized stablecoin usage on public blockchains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
